# Isabelle Ulfsdotter

Product leader and builder based in Brussels.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://ulfsdotter.com/): Product leadership profile and project overview.
- [HAL](https://ulfsdotter.com/projects/hal): Personal knowledge system with semantic search, MCP, RAG, and data sovereignty.
- [Bizzit](https://ulfsdotter.com/projects/bizzit): AI-powered business memory tool that turns photos or vague references into structured contact cards.
- [Chromos](https://ulfsdotter.com/projects/chromos): Color palette app for getting dressed, using vector search and graph thinking.

## Contact

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/isabelle-ulfsdotter-netus/)
